= January 24, 2022 =

== Topics for Today ==
- Probability
- The sum rule
- IQR and quartiles

== Homework Links ==
-   we'll use this textbook for problems
    [[https://math.buet.ac.bd/public/faculty_profile/files/835598806.pdf]]

== Additional Resources ==

You can use these if you need additional resources to read over. As a rule of thumb, don't spend more
than 10-15 minutes on each, as they aren't that important.

- Interquartile Range Explainer
  [[https://www.scribbr.com/statistics/interquartile-range/]]
- Skewness in statistics (Note, don't worry about the bit on Kurtosis)
  [[https://codeburst.io/2-important-statistics-terms-you-need-to-know-in-data-science-skewness-and-kurtosis-388fef94eeaa]]
- Standard Deviation Explainer
  [[https://www.mathsisfun.com/data/standard-deviation.html]]
